commercial_usecases.buyer_need: A product team needs a public-demo-grade launch deck that proves an AI design-to-production platform is credible, usable, and commercially grounded.
A fintech platform needs an executive keynote deck that turns agentic commerce capability into a visible business workflow and one memorable outcome.

records.source_locator: official Config identity article plus platform launch announcement; theme, palette, product-family, and sound-design observations only
records.observed_design_method: The launch system ties product breadth to a controllable identity grammar: theme-coded palettes, platform motifs, product-family cues, and audiovisual pacing are treated as one system.
records.business_requirement: Make a broad product expansion feel like one platform story instead of a catalog of features.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Cover and setup slides must use one dominant promise field, one platform motif, and a limited theme cue set; equal feature-card grids fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived identity-system logic only; no copied source imagery, no copied brand marks, no copied layout.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control may cite the same launch sources but fails if it renders product breadth as equal boxes without an identity field.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until source-brand sanitization and human visual review pass

records.source_locator: official platform launch, product page, and help page interaction descriptions; product-surface behavior paraphrased
records.observed_design_method: The product story becomes credible when a viewer sees an editable work surface, a collaboration or handoff state, and a production consequence in the same frame.
records.business_requirement: Prove that the product is an operational workflow, not an abstract AI promise.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Proof slides must allocate the largest area to an original native product surface; trace and method labels move to a small secondary rail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived workflow shape grammar only; no copied product screenshots, no copied UI chrome, no copied help text.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it shows workflow proof as a table, checklist, or generic dashboard instead of a native product theater surface.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until product-surface originality and editable-object QA pass

records.source_locator: official Sessions product keynote page and public player summary; demo sequence paraphrased only
records.observed_design_method: A business keynote demo works when capability is shown as ordered states: command, route, evidence of progress, and resolved commercial state.
records.business_requirement: Turn agentic commerce into a legible executive workflow with a clear value endpoint.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Demo slides must draw ordered native states with one path of motion or sequence metadata; equal screenshot rows fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived sequence abstraction only; no copied transcript, no copied video frame, no copied product interface.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it lists features without command-route-result sequencing.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until demo sequence review and video/audio provenance checks pass

records.source_locator: official product keynote page; business-scale and tailwind claims paraphrased without numeric invention
records.observed_design_method: The strongest keynote moments isolate one business implication, then route caveats and support into a secondary layer.
records.business_requirement: Make the climax feel like a business outcome, not another explanatory slide.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Climax slide must reserve the largest field for one outcome object and force all caveats into trace or notes; competing primary metrics fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived sourced-claim structure and generated native objects only; no copied numbers beyond verified source claims and no copied keynote visuals.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it uses several equal metrics, small tables, or unverified numbers as the climax.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until exact-metric verification and human approval pass

records.source_locator: official newsroom design announcement and developer session; material, depth, and motion principles paraphrased
records.observed_design_method: A high-end surface uses material depth, responsive highlights, and content-preserving translucency to create product theater without hiding the main content.
records.business_requirement: Lift the deck out of flat engineering-report composition while keeping product evidence readable.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Slides that claim premium product experience must combine native layered surfaces, protected content zones, and bounded highlight motion; decorative glass effects without evidence fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived material-depth principles only; no copied Apple interface, icons, screenshots, or session transcript.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it applies blur-like decoration without product proof, readability checks, or motion fallback.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until readability, contrast, motion fallback, and platform-render checks pass

records.source_locator: official Cloud Next recap and keynote writeup; AI capability and platform transformation claims paraphrased
records.observed_design_method: AI platform announcements need a staged reveal: business pressure, capability system, product proof, and one transformation claim.
records.business_requirement: Show why AI platform capability changes a real workflow rather than merely naming models or features.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Setup and proof slides must bind capability labels to a visible workflow map; abstract AI feature piles fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived platform-story structure only; no copied event visuals, partner logos, or keynote frames.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it turns AI claims into a dense logo wall, model list, or non-sequenced feature grid.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until claim-source mapping and brand sanitization pass

records.source_locator: official Duarte slide-design training and visual storytelling webinar pages; method-level claims paraphrased
records.observed_design_method: Professional slide design starts from the message hierarchy and story contrast before decoration or layout.
records.business_requirement: Prevent the product from producing visually busy slides that are traceable but not persuasive.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Every slide must declare one claim, one proof object, and one reading route before code draws shapes; slides with multiple equal claims fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived paraphrased design-method principles only; no copied course language, example slides, diagrams, or transcript.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it treats tutorial evidence as generic design tips without claim-proof-route binding.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until human editorial review confirms claim hierarchy

records.source_locator: presentation whitespace and PowerPoint tutorial pages; spacing, hierarchy, and margin observations only
records.observed_design_method: Whitespace is a structural decision: macro zones create story emphasis while micro gaps protect labels, rails, and proof marks.
records.business_requirement: Make generated decks look authored instead of assembled from dense blocks.
records.derived_generation_constraint: Before native drawing, the generator must choose macro zones, minimum margin, gutter, and visible-word budget; collapsed margins fail.
records.anti_copy_boundary: Use derived spacing principles only; no copied tutorial visuals, no copied arrows, no copied examples.
records.bad_control_probe: A bad control fails if it changes color or font size without enforcing spacing tokens and density budgets.
records.release_boundary: public_blocked until layout geometry QA and thumbnail hierarchy review pass
